overall.description: A stationary cinematic shot of a wizarding school common room (Gryffindor) from a video game, featuring a lit stone fireplace, red velvet furniture, and students in robes walking through the warm, wood-paneled interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle common room with central fireplace and seating areas

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint from a fixed position near a red sofa, observing students moving through the common room

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting on the red velvet sofa, occasionally shifting position
student in dark robes walking from right to left across the room, passing in front of the fireplace

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and carved mantelpiece
plush red sofa with gold trim where a student is seated
wooden balustrade of an upper level overlooking the common room
ornate hanging chandelier with multiple lit candles
gold-framed painting of a landscape hanging on the red wall
upholstered armchair with side table and lamp
tall floor lamp with fringed shade next to the armchair
decorative fabric wall hangings between the windows and balcony

segments.scene_description: A static view of a warm, firelit wizarding common room with rich red walls and wooden architecture. Students in dark robes periodically walk through the space while one remains seated on a red velvet sofa in the foreground. The scene maintains a cozy, medieval atmosphere with no camera movement throughout the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a cozy wizarding common room that maintains a consistent mood of warmth and medieval comfort. It begins with a focus on the rich red walls and intricate wooden architecture, illuminated by the flickering glow of a firelit hearth. As the scene unfolds, students in dark robes periodically drift through the space, adding a sense of lived-in activity to the environment. The composition remains anchored by a student seated on a red velvet sofa in the foreground, while the surrounding interior continues to radiate a steady, inviting warmth.
